context: Tests whether the ActivityKit skill guidance is applied for live activity implementation.

checklist.name: Plist enablement
checklist.description: Specifies that the host app declares NSSupportsLiveActivities = YES.

checklist.name: Attributes split
checklist.description: Defines ActivityAttributes with static outer data and nested Codable, Hashable ContentState for dynamic data.

checklist.name: Small state
checklist.description: States that ContentState should stay small because updates and push payloads serialize it.

checklist.name: ActivityContent lifecycle
checklist.description: Uses ActivityContent-based Activity.request, update, and end APIs rather than deprecated contentState lifecycle APIs.

checklist.name: Stale handling
checklist.description: Sets staleDate and handles context.isStale or equivalent stale fallback UI.

checklist.name: Lock Screen first
checklist.description: Treats Lock Screen as the primary Live Activity surface and does not rely on Dynamic Island availability.

checklist.name: Dynamic Island modes
checklist.description: Includes compact, minimal, and expanded Dynamic Island presentations for devices that support Dynamic Island.

checklist.name: Token rotation
checklist.description: Observes activity.pushTokenUpdates and forwards every token to the server because tokens can rotate.

checklist.name: Ending paths
checklist.description: Ends the Live Activity on success/completion, error, and cancellation paths.

checklist.name: Duration limits
checklist.description: Distinguishes active lifetime up to 8 hours, possible system-ended Lock Screen presence up to 12 hours total, and app-ended default dismissal up to 4 hours.
